title: Surgeon Vacancy at Novartis India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Novartis India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!
